faqs.question: What is my deductible?
faqs.answer: Your annual deductible is the amount you pay before your insurance kicks in. Refer to your policy document Section 3 for your specific amount.

faqs.question: How do I file a claim?
faqs.answer: Log into the member portal, go to Claims > Submit New Claim, and upload your hospital bill and discharge summary.

faqs.question: Is physiotherapy covered?
faqs.answer: Physiotherapy is covered up to 20 sessions per year under the Wellness add-on plan. Check if your plan includes this add-on.

faqs.question: What is the cashless hospitalisation process?
faqs.answer: Present your insurance card at any network hospital. The hospital will coordinate directly with us for pre-authorisation.

faqs.question: How do I add a dependent to my plan?
faqs.answer: Log into the member portal and go to My Plan > Add Dependents. You can add a spouse or children. Changes take effect from the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: What is the claim reimbursement timeline?
faqs.answer: Claim reimbursements are typically processed within 7–10 working days after all documents are submitted. You will receive an SMS and email confirmation.
